Shared.supportDesc: Need assistance? Our team is here to help you dominate the UGC space.
Shared.whatsappDesc: Connect with our local agents instantly for booking issues or inquiries.
Shared.faq1Q: How do I use my credits?
Shared.faq1A: Credits are automatically applied when you finalize a campaign or studio booking mission.
Shared.faq2A: Cancellations are free up to 24 hours before the scheduled mission start time.

Common.somethingWentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Landing.heroDescription: Book top-tier Moroccan creators and premium studios in seconds. Use code {code} for 20% off your first campaign.
Landing.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Go Viral.
Landing.featuresSubtitle: Streamline your entire content production workflow from a single, powerful dashboard.
Landing.feature1Desc: Access a curated network of top-tier creators ready to produce authentic, high-converting content for your brand.
Landing.feature2Desc: Book fully equipped production spaces with green screens, podcast setups, and professional lighting in seconds.
Landing.feature3Desc: Get your content delivered in as little as 48 hours. Agile production for the fast-paced social media landscape.
Landing.feature4Desc: Keep track of your spending, completed orders, and active bookings — all from a single, clean dashboard.
Landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Three simple steps to your next winning campaign.
Landing.step1Desc: Ship your products to our studio in Casablanca or Rabat. We handle the logistics.
Landing.step2Desc: Our Moroccan creators produce authentic, viral-ready videos tailored to your brand.
Landing.step3Desc: Get 4K videos delivered to your dashboard or via WhatsApp in 48h. Approve and go viral.
Landing.statsSubtitle: From Casablanca to Marrakech — we help brands create scroll-stopping content, fast.
Landing.ctaNoCommitment: No commitment. Book your first session today.
Landing.footerBrandDesc: The #1 UGC Platform in Morocco. We connect brands with top local creators and premium studios to produce viral content that converts.
Landing.footerAddress:
Villa N° 12, Rue d'Alger,
Ville Nouvelle, Meknes, Morocco

Legal.privacyIntroDesc: Yalla Viral respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy will inform you as to how we look after your personal data when you visit our website.
Legal.privacyDataDesc: We may collect, use, store and transfer different kinds of personal data about you which we have grouped together follows: Identity Data, Contact Data, Technical Data, and Usage Data.
Legal.privacyUseDesc: We will only use your personal data when the law allows us to. Most commonly, we will use your personal data in the following circumstances: To perform the contract we are about to enter into or have entered into with you.
Legal.privacySecurityDesc: We have put in place appropriate security measures to prevent your personal data from being accidentally lost, used or accessed in an unauthorized way, altered or disclosed.
Legal.privacyLawDesc: In accordance with Law No. 09-08 regarding the protection of individuals with respect to the processing of personal data, you have the right to access, rectify, and oppose the processing of your personal data.
Legal.privacyContactDesc: For any questions regarding this privacy policy or our privacy practices, please contact us at privacy@yallaviral.ma.
Legal.termsAgreementDesc: By accessing or using Yalla Viral, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, you may not access the service.
Legal.termsServicesDesc: Yalla Viral creates UGC (User Generated Content) campaigns connecting brands with creators. We act as a platform to facilitate these connections and manage campaign workflows.
Legal.termsAccountsDesc: When you create an account with us, you must provide us information that is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Failure to do so constitutes a breach of the Terms.
Legal.termsPaymentsDesc: Services are billed as per the agreed quotation or subscription plan. For Moroccan entities, payments can be processed via bank transfer (Virement Bancaire) upon issuance of a valid invoice (Facture).
Legal.termsIPDesc: The service and its original content, features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of Yalla Viral and its licensors.
Legal.termsLawDesc: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of Morocco, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
Legal.termsContactDesc: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us via WhatsApp or email at support@yallaviral.ma.
